title: Relay doubles the bar, outpacing Novartis with a 60% response in rare disease
snippet: Analysts are extremely encouraged by Phase 2 trial results for Relay Therapeutics’ PI3KA inhibitor in treating vascular malformations (VM), prompting the biotech to eye a potential path to accelerated approval.

title: Takeda cuts send layoffs soaring in May, rising year over year
snippet: Far fewer companies are letting employees go so far in 2026 compared to 2025, but the number of people affected is trending up, especially this month, according to BioSpace tallies.

title: BioMarin suffers another blow to rare disease portfolio in Phase 3 flop
snippet: BioMarin’s investigational therapy failed to elicit clinical improvements in patients with ENPP1 deficiency, while also missing key secondary endpoints of rickets severity and growth.

title: Human pancreatic progenitor organoids define genetic and epigenetic barriers to early PDAC transformation.
snippet: The lack of accurate human models that recapitulate pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) initiation has hindered therapeutic development. Using pluripotent stem cell-derived pancreatic progenitor organoids, we established a human PDAC model that faithfully reproduces the genetic, epigenetic, and transcriptomic trajectories of tumor initiation and progres...

title: Single-Cell Analysis Identifies Endothelial VTE Signatures as Predictors of Immunotherapy Resistance and Survival across Cancers.
publicationName: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
journalName: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH
snippet: Venous thromboembolism (VTE) is a major complication in cancer patients, yet the transcriptional mechanisms by which tumor-associated endothelial cells drive thrombogenesis and immune evasion remain poorly understood. To characterize VTE-related transcriptional signatures in the tumor microenvironment (TME), identify endothelial-specific risk genes, and dev...

title: The USP7-VIM axis mediates lipid metabolic remodelling and compromises CD8T-cell mitochondrial fitness in glioblastoma.
snippet: Glioblastoma (GBM) remains a highly lethal malignancy for which current treatments offer only a limited therapeutic benefit. Although vimentin (VIM) is classically regarded as a cytoskeletal protein, its role in tumour immune regulation is poorly understood. Here, we showed that extracellular tumour-derived VIM was associated with impaired CD8T-cell antitum...

title: sarcoma: clinical, diagnostic and therapeutic insights into a distinct oncologic entity.
snippet: sarcomas are aggressive soft tissue tumours that often mimic Ewing sarcoma but are distinct in their molecular and clinical behaviour. We describe a young adult male initially managed for a presumed primitive neuroectodermal tumour, later confirmed to have afusion-positive sarcoma through fluorescence in situ hybridisation and NGS analysis.
